name: healthcare-dashboard
prompt: Build a healthcare CRM dashboard with patient list, upcoming appointments, and KPI cards
assertions: Output contains at least 3 KPI cards with realistic healthcare metrics
Uses SnowUI 3-column dashboard layout (sidebar + content + right bar)
Patient table has 5-8 rows with diverse, realistic names and medical data
All spacing values are multiples of 4px
Color values use opacity system (rgba not hardcoded grays)
Sidebar contains navigation items relevant to healthcare
Typography uses Inter font family throughout
KPI values use proper formatting ($, commas, percentages)

name: auth-flow-multi-screen
prompt: Create an authentication flow for a clinic portal with login, registration, and forgot password
assertions: Produces at least 3 separate screens (login, register, forgot password)
Screen inventory presented before building
Navigation between screens works (links/routing)
Auth cards use centered single-column layout (480px max-width)
Form inputs use SnowUI Input component specs (44px or 64px height)
Buttons use SnowUI Button specs (filled style, full width)
Social login options present on login screen
Error states shown or documented for form validation
Shared layout elements consistent across screens

name: settings-page
prompt: Build a settings page with sidebar navigation and profile section
assertions: 2-column layout: settings sidebar + content panel
Sidebar navigation with active state indicator (Black/4% fill)
At least 3 settings categories in sidebar
Profile section has form inputs for name, email, avatar
Form layout matches SnowUI form composition (gaps are multiples of 4px)
Save/cancel action buttons present
Section headers use correct typography scale

name: ecommerce-product-list
prompt: Build an eCommerce product management page with a data table, filters, and bulk actions
assertions: Table component with header row, 5-8 data rows, function bar
Function bar includes search, filter, and action buttons
Table cells include varied types: text, badge (status), currency, image placeholder
Pagination present at bottom of table
Column headers use 12px/400 Black/40% as per SnowUI spec
Hover-only action buttons on data rows
Realistic product names and prices (not lorem ipsum)

name: admin-portal-full
prompt: Build a complete admin portal with dashboard, user management, and settings — functional navigation between all sections
assertions: Screen inventory includes at least 4 screens
Shared layout shell (sidebar + header) consistent across all screens
Dashboard screen has KPI cards and at least one chart or table
User management screen has a data table with user records
Settings screen has categorized form panels
Sidebar navigation highlights active section
All screens accessible via working navigation
No screen is a dead end (can always navigate back)
